dwc.name: Darwin Core
dwc.description: Darwin Core standard terms for biodiversity data

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/catalogNumb.name: catalogNumber
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/catalogNumb.description: An identifier for the record within the data set or collection

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedBy.name: recordedBy
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedBy.description: A person, group, or organization responsible for recording the original Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/individualC.name: individualCount
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/individualC.description: The number of individuals present at the time of the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sex.name: sex
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sex.description: The sex of the biological individual(s) represented in the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lifeStage.name: lifeStage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lifeStage.description: The age class or life stage of the Organism(s) at the time the Occurrence was recorded

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/reproductiv.name: reproductiveCondition
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/reproductiv.description: The reproductive condition of the biological individual(s) represented in the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/behavior.name: behavior
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/behavior.description: The behavior shown by the subject at the time the Occurrence was recorded

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/preparation.name: preparations
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/preparation.description: A list of preparations and preservation methods for a specimen

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/disposition.name: disposition
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/disposition.description: The current state of a specimen with respect to the collection identified in collectionCode

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/otherCatalo.name: otherCatalogNumbers
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/otherCatalo.description: A list of previous or alternate fully qualified catalog numbers

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceR.name: occurrenceRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceR.description: Comments or notes about the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventDate.name: eventDate
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventDate.description: The date-time or interval during which an Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventTime.name: eventTime
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventTime.description: The time or interval during which an Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/startDayOfY.name: startDayOfYear
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/startDayOfY.description: The earliest integer day of the year on which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/endDayOfYea.name: endDayOfYear
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/endDayOfYea.description: The latest integer day of the year on which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/year.name: year
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/year.description: The four-digit year in which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/month.name: month
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/month.description: The integer month in which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/day.name: day
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/day.description: The integer day of the month on which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEve.name: verbatimEventDate
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEve.description: The verbatim original representation of the date and time information for an Event

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/habitat.name: habitat
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/habitat.description: A category or description of the habitat in which the Event occurred

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/samplingPro.name: samplingProtocol
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/samplingPro.description: The names of, references to, or descriptions of the methods or protocols used during an Event

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fieldNumber.name: fieldNumber
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fieldNumber.description: An identifier given to the event in the field

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventRemark.name: eventRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventRemark.description: Comments or notes about the Event

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/continent.name: continent
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/continent.description: The name of the continent in which the Location occurs

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/country.name: country
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/country.description: The name of the country or major administrative unit in which the Location occurs

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/countryCode.name: countryCode
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/countryCode.description: The standard code for the country in which the Location occurs

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/stateProvin.name: stateProvince
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/stateProvin.description: The name of the next smaller administrative region than country

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/county.name: county
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/county.description: The full, unabbreviated name of the next smaller administrative region than stateProvince

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/municipalit.name: municipality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/municipalit.description: The full, unabbreviated name of the next smaller administrative region than county

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locality.name: locality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locality.description: The specific description of the place

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLoc.name: verbatimLocality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLoc.description: The original textual description of the place

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumElev.name: minimumElevationInMeters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumElev.description: The lower limit of the range of elevation

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumElev.name: maximumElevationInMeters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumElev.description: The upper limit of the range of elevation

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLati.name: decimalLatitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLati.description: The geographic latitude in decimal degrees of the geographic center of a Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLong.name: decimalLongitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLong.description: The geographic longitude in decimal degrees of the geographic center of a Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geodeticDat.name: geodeticDatum
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geodeticDat.description: The ellipsoid, geodetic datum, or spatial reference system used in decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateU.name: coordinateUncertaintyInMeters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateU.description: The horizontal distance from the given decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude describing the smallest circle containing the whole of the Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.name: verbatimCoordinates
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.description: The verbatim original spatial coordinates of the Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLat.name: verbatimLatitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLat.description: The verbatim original latitude of the Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLon.name: verbatimLongitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLon.description: The verbatim original longitude of the Location

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/kingdom.name: kingdom
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/kingdom.description: The full scientific name of the kingdom in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/phylum.name: phylum
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/phylum.description: The full scientific name of the phylum in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/class.name: class
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/class.description: The full scientific name of the class in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/order.name: order
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/order.description: The full scientific name of the order in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/family.name: family
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/family.description: The full scientific name of the family in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genus.name: genus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genus.description: The full scientific name of the genus in which the taxon is classified

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/specificEpi.name: specificEpithet
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/specificEpi.description: The name of the first or species epithet of the scientificName

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/infraspecif.name: infraspecificEpithet
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/infraspecif.description: The name of the lowest or terminal infraspecific epithet of the scientificName

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonRank.name: taxonRank
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonRank.description: The taxonomic rank of the most specific name in the scientificName

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.name: scientificName
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.description: The full scientific name, with authorship and date information if known

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.name: scientificNameAuthorship
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.description: The authorship information for the scientificName

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherClass.name: higherClassification
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherClass.description: A list of taxa names terminating at the rank immediately superior to the referenced taxon

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonomicSt.name: taxonomicStatus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonomicSt.description: The status of the use of the scientificName as a label for a taxon

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/basisOfReco.name: basisOfRecord
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/basisOfReco.description: The specific nature of the data record

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institution.name: institutionCode
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institution.description: The name or acronym in use by the institution having custody of the object(s) or information referred to in the record

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionC.name: collectionCode
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionC.description: The name, acronym, coden, or initialism identifying the collection or data set from which the record was derived

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetName.name: datasetName
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetName.description: The name identifying the data set from which the record was derived

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/ownerInstit.name: ownerInstitutionCode
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/ownerInstit.description: The name or acronym in use by the institution having ownership of the object(s) or information referred to in the record

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/information.name: informationWithheld
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/information.description: Additional information that exists, but that has not been shared in the given record

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dataGeneral.name: dataGeneralizations
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dataGeneral.description: Actions taken to make the shared data less specific or complete than in its original form

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identifiedB.name: identifiedBy
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identifiedB.description: A person, group, or organization who assigned the Taxon to the subject

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dateIdentif.name: dateIdentified
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dateIdentif.description: The date on which the subject was determined as representing the Taxon

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: identificationRemarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: Comments or notes about the Identification

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/typeStatus.name: typeStatus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/typeStatus.description: A list of nomenclatural types applied to the subject

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedM.name: associatedMedia
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedM.description: A list of identifiers of media associated with the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedR.name: associatedReferences
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedR.description: A list of identifiers of literature associated with the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedS.name: associatedSequences
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedS.description: A list of identifiers of genetic sequence information associated with the Occurrence

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedT.name: associatedTaxa
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedT.description: A list of identifiers or names of taxa and the associations of this Occurrence to each of them

http://purl.org/dc/terms/type.name: type
http://purl.org/dc/terms/type.description: The nature or genre of the resource

http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.name: modified
http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.description: The most recent date-time on which the resource was changed

http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.name: license
http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource

http://purl.org/dc/terms/rightsHolder.name: rightsHolder
http://purl.org/dc/terms/rightsHolder.description: A person or organization owning or managing rights over the resource

http://purl.org/dc/terms/accessRights.name: accessRights
http://purl.org/dc/terms/accessRights.description: Information about who can access the resource or an indication of its security status

http://purl.org/dc/terms/bibliographicCi.name: bibliographicCitation
http://purl.org/dc/terms/bibliographicCi.description: A bibliographic reference for the resource

http://purl.org/dc/terms/references.name: references
http://purl.org/dc/terms/references.description: A related resource that is referenced, cited, or otherwise pointed to by the described resource

ac.name: Audiovisual Core
ac.description: Audiovisual Core terms for multimedia resources

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/accessURI.name: accessURI
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/accessURI.description: A URI that uniquely identifies a service that provides a representation of the underlying resource

http://purl.org/dc/terms/format.name: format
http://purl.org/dc/terms/format.description: The file format, physical medium, or dimensions of the resource

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/subtype.name: subtype
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/subtype.description: Any type term from the vocabulary of types used that further refines the media type

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/caption.name: caption
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/caption.description: Text to be displayed together with the media representation

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/tag.name: tag
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/tag.description: A tag or keyword associated with the media item
